title: trigonotis icumae
intro: Trigonotis icumae, also known as Icy Grass or Icy Weed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Trigonotis icumae include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems like diarrhea and nausea. In herbal preparations, Trigonotis icumae is typically dried and made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
